message.content:
Explore the Iskrib v3 app at C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\ to understand the design system:

1. Check for global styles: App.css, index.css, any theme files, variables.css, etc.
2. Check package.json for UI dependencies (tailwind, material-ui, styled-components, etc.)
3. Look at the overall app structure - App.jsx or App.js, routing, layout components
4. Check for any existing color palette, design tokens, or CSS custom properties
5. Look at how other components are styled - check a few random components for patterns
6. Check if there's a public/index.html with font imports or a fonts directory
7. Look for any navbar/header component to understand the existing visual language

Return full file contents for key files found.

1→import { StrictMode } from 'react'
     2→import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
     3→import './index.css'
     4→import App from './App.jsx'
     5→import { AuthProvider } from './Context/Authcontext.jsx'
     6→import { ThemeProvider } from './Context/ThemeContext.jsx'
     7→import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     8→

    10→

    12→  <StrictMode>

    14→      <ThemeProvider>
    15→        <AuthProvider>
    16→          <App />
    17→        </AuthProvider>
    18→      </ThemeProvider>
    19→    </QueryClientProvider>
    20→  </StrictMode>,
    21→)

content.text:
Excellent! Now let me create a comprehensive report. Let me compile my findings: ## Iskrib v3 Design System Analysis Based on my exploration of the codebase at `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\`, here is a comprehensive breakdown of the design system: ### 1. Global Styles & Design Tokens **File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\index.css` The app uses a comprehensive CSS custom properties system with semantic color tokens: **Color Palette (Light Mode):** - Primary backgrounds: `#ffffff` - Secondary backgrounds: `rgb(250, 250, 250)` - Text primary: `rgb(4, 20, 29)` (dark navy) - Text secondary: `rgb(75, 75, 75)` - Text muted: `rgb(130, 130, 130)` - Accent purple: `rgb(94, 66, 255)` - Accent dark: `rgb(4, 20, 29)` - Accent dark hover: `rgb(16, 56, 79)` - Borders: `rgba(151, 151, 151, 0.168)` and `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06)` - Shadows: - Card: `2px 2px 10px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.182)` - Modal: `0 4px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)` **Dark Mode Support:** Full dark mode theme available with `[data-theme="dark"]` selector with adjusted color values for all tokens. **Typography:** - Default font: `"Nunito"` (sans-serif) - Serif font: `"Lora"` (for body text) - Imported fonts from Google Fonts: - Comfortaa (300-700) - Lexend Deca (100-900) - Lora (400-700, italic variants) - Nunito (200-1000, italic variants) - Shadows Into Light - Sniglet (400, 800) ### 2. UI Dependencies **File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\package.json` **Key UI Libraries:** - **Lexical** (`@lexical/react`, `@lexical/rich-text`, `lexical@0.17.0`) - Rich text editor - **Framer Motion** (`^12.23.23`) - Animation library - **React Router DOM** (`^7.9.3`) - Routing - **React Spinners** (`^0.17.0`) - Loading spinners - **React Easy Crop** (`^5.5.3`) - Image cropping - **React Responsive** (`^10.0.1`) - Media queries - **React Query (TanStack)** (`^5.90.5`) - Data fetching - **Supabase** (`^2.75.1`) - Backend/auth - **Canvas Confetti** (`^1.9.4`) - Celebration animations **No Tailwind or Material-UI** - Uses vanilla CSS with CSS custom properties ### 3. App Structure **File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\App.jsx` - Uses `HashRouter` for routing - Wraps app in `LexicalComposer` for rich text editing - Route structure: - `/` → redirects to `/home` - `/home` (main feed with nested routes) - `/profile` (user profile) - `/visitProfile` (view other users) - `/login` and `/signUp` - Nested routes for notifications, collections, opinions ### 4. Layout Components **Main Layout Structure:** ``` HomePage (root layout) ├── Sidebar (250px fixed left) ├── Center content area (750px) ├── Right sidebar (27% width for opinions) └── Mobile responsive versions ``` **Files inspected:** - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\home.jsx` - `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\SideBar.jsx` ### 5. Design System Patterns & Component Styling **Sidebar Component** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\SideBar\sidebar.css`): - Uses CSS variables for theming - Rounded buttons (12px border-radius) - Smooth transitions (0.12s ease) - Interactive states with hover effects - Theme toggle switch with custom styling - Notification badge (red bg: `rgb(255, 42, 42)`) **Post Cards** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\HomePage\postCards\postcards.css`): - Card design with `border: 1px solid var(--border-card)` - Rounded corners (12px) - Hover shadow effects - Color-coded avatar rings: - Legend: `#FFD700` (gold) - OG: `#9B59FF` (purple) - Icon hover states with color changes: - Like: `rgb(255, 116, 116)` (red) - Comment: `rgb(47, 154, 255)` (blue) - Bookmark: `rgb(72, 208, 135)` (green) - Reading time pill with background styling - Responsive mobile layout **Login Page** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\LoginPage\login.css`): - Clean minimalist design - Uses custom fonts (Lexend Deca for logo) - Input styling with 12px border-radius - Button states with opacity transitions - Error message styling with red background `rgba(255, 59, 48, 0.08)` - Sign-up link color: `rgb(157, 139, 254)` (light purple) **Auth Modal** (`C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\AuthModal\authmodal.css`): - Overlay with backdrop blur - Modal with `box-shadow: 1px 1px 20px 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15)` - 12px border-radius - Simple black/white button styling - Responsive width adjustments for mobile ### 6. Color Accent System **Interactive Elements:** - Primary accent: `rgb(94, 66, 255)` (purple) - used for active states - Secondary accent: `rgb(4, 20, 29)` (dark navy) - buttons & CTAs - Success indicators: `rgb(72, 208, 135)` (green) - Error/attention: `rgb(255, 42, 42)` (red) - Interactive blue: `rgb(47, 154, 255)` (light blue) ### 7. Responsive Design Breakpoints used: - `768px` - tablet/medium screens - `480px` - mobile phones - `428px` - smaller phones - Fixed widths: 250px sidebar, 750px content, variable right sidebar ### 8. Theme System **File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\Context\ThemeContext.jsx` (referenced in main.jsx) - ThemeProvider context for dark/light mode - Uses `data-theme` attribute on root element - All colors defined as CSS variables for easy switching - Toggle button in sidebar with custom switch component ### 9. HTML Structure **File:** `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\index.html` ```html Iskryb
``` ### 10. Typography System **Font Family Hierarchy:** - Default body: `"Nunito"` (modern, clean) - Headings/Titles: `"Lexend Deca"` (geometric, distinctive) - Body content: `"Lora"` (serif, readable) - Sidebar headers: Franklin Gothic Medium (fallback stack) - Special decorative: Shadows Into Light, Sniglet **Font Sizes (examples from components):** - Large titles: 3.2rem (login logo), 2.6rem (mobile) - Section headers: 1.65rem (sidebar) - Body text: 0.88-0.95rem - Small labels: 0.6-0.78rem --- ### Summary The Iskrib v3 app uses a **modern, variable-based CSS design system** with: - Semantic color tokens for light/dark mode - No CSS framework dependencies (pure CSS with variables) - Clean, rounded aesthetic (12px border radius standard) - Smooth micro-interactions (0.12-0.2s transitions) - Strong typography hierarchy with multiple Google fonts - Responsive design with mobile-first considerations - Integrated theme switching via context - Rich text editing with Lexical - Smooth animations with Framer Motion
